key_items: Bitcoin drops after $78K pop, bears defend $77,000 and bulls hold $74,000 support
Bitcoin spot volume collapses 81% since October with $14B liquidation setup threatening $60,000
Major institutional accumulation continues (Strive adds 1,109 BTC, Smarter Web adds 10 BTC) offsetting technical weakness
reasoning: Bitcoin faces conflicting forces: institutional treasury accumulation and mining sector strength from AI boom are supportive, but technical deterioration with collapsing spot volumes, weakening ETF inflows, and large liquidation setups create near-term downside pressure. The $74,000-$77,000 range represents a critical indecision zone with elevated risk of capitulation toward $60,000-$65,000 before any sustained recovery.
risks: Head-and-shoulders formation with 81% volume collapse and $14B liquidation cascade could trigger capitulation sell-off toward $52,000-$60,000 if $74,000 support breaks.
